confidence_rationale: Excellent expert demonstration with exceptional speed (3.47s vs 80-120s expert benchmark). Suture placement appears precise, though some detail limited by video quality. This appears to be a demonstration focusing on speed and efficiency.
cannot_determine: Third throw completion - video appears to end after second throw
Final suture cutting - not visible in provided frames
technique_summary: Exceptional expert-level performance demonstrating rapid, precise intracorporeal suturing with proper hand switching technique. Speed of 3.47 seconds is well beyond typical expert benchmarks, suggesting this is a specialized demonstration of maximum efficiency.
strengths: Extremely rapid execution while maintaining precision

demonstrated_techniques: efficient suture placement through marked points
surgeon's knot formation with double throw
verbal_cues: 3 Seconds 3 Knots - emphasis on speed and efficiency
Where there's a will, there's a way - motivational messaging
common_errors_addressed: demonstrates proper hand switching to avoid knot slippage
shows efficient needle loading to minimize time loss

improvement_suggestions: This demonstration shows optimal technique - study the hand movements and coordination
Note the efficiency of needle loading and minimal wasted motion
